title_en: The Garlic Secret: Maximize Health Benefits
title_es: El Secreto del Ajo: Maximiza Sus Beneficios
key_message: Crush garlic and let it sit for 10 minutes to maximize the formation of allicin, which has potent antibacterial and antiviral properties.
props_needed: Timer or phone with timer app
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Garlic — Contains allicin — a compound with potent antibacterial and antiviral properties (Tip: Crush and let sit 10 minutes before cooking to maximize allicin formation)

title_en: Garlic: A Health Boost in Every Clove
title_es: Ajo: Un Impulso de Salud en Cada Diente
hook_en: How can one tiny clove make a big impact?
hook_es: ¿Cómo puede un pequeño diente tener un gran impacto?
key_message: Garlic contains allicin, which boosts immunity and fights infections. Letting crushed garlic sit before cooking enhances these benefits.
visual_elements: Whole garlic bulb splitting into cloves
Animation of germs being zapped by allicin
Healthy dish with garlic being served
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Garlic — Contains allicin — a compound with potent antibacterial and antiviral properties (Tip: Crush and let sit 10 minutes before cooking to maximize allicin formation)
